# Simplifii-OS
> The neuroinclusive AI study companion for every kind of mind.

## What it is
Simplifii-OS is a free AI-powered study tool designed specifically for neurodiverse students (ADHD, dyslexia, autism, and all learning differences). It helps learners decode rubrics, plan assignments, write with confidence, and submit on time.

## Who it is for
- Primary school students (Years 1-6)
- Secondary school students (Years 7-12, HSC, VCE, QCE, WACE)
- University and college students (undergraduate)
- Postgraduate and research students (MRes, PhD)
- TAFE and vocational learners
- Homeschooling families
- Teachers and educators

## Key features
- AURA: AI study companion that guides without writing for you (Socratic method)
- Rubric decoder: translates academic criteria into plain language
- Three-tier canvas: AI scaffolds (Tier 1), Socratic questions (Tier 2), your writing (Tier 3)
- Authenticity Report: proves what is yours vs what AI contributed
- Accessibility: literal mode, bionic reading, dyslexia fonts, screen reader support
- Spoon Theory energy tracking for managing cognitive load
- Practice mode: HSC/VCE/QCE/WACE exam questions with AI guidance
- Institutional navigator: LMS help, extension templates, disability support referrals

## Built by
Simplifii Pty Ltd, Sydney, Australia
Founded by Aaron Bugge (UNSW, neurodiversity researcher)

## Values
- Trauma-informed: no guilt, no shame, no toxic positivity
- Strengths-based: leads with what you do well
- Sovereign: your work is private, institutions see only statistics
- Australian English throughout

## URL
https://simplifii-os-main.vercel.app
